chat.title: eVoiceClaw Desktop
chat.subtitle: AI OS
chat.selectMode: Select a model to start chatting
chat.disclaimer: AI may make mistakes. Please verify critical information.

skills.title: Skill Management
skills.description: Install and manage AI Skills, reviewed by the Gatekeeper for safety
skills.confirmUninstall: Are you sure you want to uninstall this Skill?
skills.noSkillsHint: Install Skills to let AI perform more tasks through secure commands

audit.title: Audit Log
audit.description: View complete audit records of all security-related operations
audit.noLogsHint: Shell executions, Skill installations and other operations are automatically logged

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage Provider configuration and API Keys
settings.privacyLegalBasis: Follows the minimum necessity principle (PIPL Art. 6 / GDPR Art. 25). Only information that can be linked to your personal identity is redacted before being sent to the AI.
settings.privacyScopeDesc: The following will be replaced with anonymous placeholders before being sent to the AI. Protection applies to input only and does not affect AI responses.
settings.notScopeDeidentified: De-identified business data (cannot be linked to a specific person)
settings.notScopeToolResult: Tool call results (weather, search, and other public data)
settings.notScopeOutput: AI responses (protection applies to input only)
settings.sensitivityLevelsDesc: Controls which types of information trigger redaction. Critical level (direct identifiers) is always enabled and cannot be turned off.
settings.sensitivity_critical_desc: Phone numbers, ID card numbers, bank card numbers, passport numbers — information that directly identifies a person.
settings.sensitivity_high_desc: Email addresses, name + address combinations — information that can be linked to a specific person alone or in combination.
settings.sensitivity_medium_desc: Names appearing alone, standalone addresses — information that may identify a person when combined with context.
settings.sensitivity_low_desc: General location areas, occupation — information with weak linkage to personal identity (disabled by default).

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.description: Manage project workspaces with automatic context injection
workspace.confirmUnregister: Unregister this workspace? (Only removes metadata, project files are untouched)
workspace.noWorkspacesHint: Register a workspace so AI can automatically inject project context
workspace.pathError: Path does not exist or is not a directory

memory.title: Memory Management
memory.description: Manage cross-session memories, automatically recalled during conversations
